executive_summary.description: A high-level overview of the findings, summarizing the availability of international mutual funds for Indian investors as of April 2026 that meet the specified investment criteria.

industry_wide_cap_usd_billion.description: The total industry-wide limit for overseas investments set by SEBI/RBI, in billions of US dollars.

per_amc_cap_usd_billion.description: The maximum overseas investment limit for a single Asset Management Company (AMC), in billions of US dollars.

etf_industry_wide_cap_usd_billion.description: The total industry-wide limit specifically for investments in overseas Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), in billions of US dollars.

etf_per_amc_cap_usd_million.description: The maximum overseas ETF investment limit for a single AMC, in millions of US dollars.

impact_on_subscriptions.description: Explanation of how these regulatory caps affect the subscription status of international funds (e.g., leading to closures or caps).

fund_name.description: The official name of the mutual fund.

amc.description: The Asset Management Company that manages the fund.

category.description: The category of the fund, such as Fund of Funds (FoF), ETF FoF, or Index Fund.

subscription_status.description: The current subscription status as of April 15, 2026 (e.g., 'Open', 'Capped').

monthly_investment_limit_per_pan.description: The maximum allowed monthly investment per PAN, or a note if no cap is disclosed.

aum_in_crore.description: The latest Assets Under Management (AUM) of the fund, in crores of INR.

one_year_return_percentage.description: The fund's trailing 1-year return as a percentage.

total_expense_ratio_percentage.description: The Total Expense Ratio (TER) of the fund's direct plan, as a percentage.

top_underlying_holdings.description: A list of the top underlying holdings of the fund, which could be stocks or other ETFs.

country_exposure.description: A summary of the fund's geographic allocation, particularly the primary country exposures.

availability_on_zerodha_coin.description: Indicates if the fund is available for investment on the Zerodha Coin platform.

availability_on_groww.description: Indicates if the fund is available for investment on the Groww platform.

availability_on_value_research.description: Indicates if the fund is listed or tracked on the Value Research platform.

eligible_international_funds.description: A complete list of Indian mutual funds with international exposure that are open for fresh subscriptions and allow a monthly investment of at least ₹1 lakh per PAN as of April 15, 2026. Each entry will detail the fund name, AMC, category (e.g., FoF, ETF FoF), subscription status, monthly investment limit, latest AUM, 1-year return, total expense ratio, top underlying holdings with country/ETF exposure, and availability on Zerodha Coin, Groww, and Value Research.

fund_name.description: The official name of the excluded mutual fund.

amc.description: The Asset Management Company that manages the fund.

reason_for_exclusion.description: The specific reason the fund was excluded (e.g., 'Closed to new subscriptions', 'Monthly investment cap below ₹1 lakh').

funds_not_meeting_criteria.description: A list of international funds that were analyzed but excluded from the main list because they are closed to new subscriptions or have a monthly investment cap below ₹1 lakh per PAN. The reason for exclusion will be noted for each fund.

category_name.description: The name of the investment category (e.g., 'US Tech-focused', 'Broad Developed Markets').

analysis_summary.description: A brief summary of the characteristics and risk-reward profile of this category.

comparison_table.description: A list of funds within this category with their comparative metrics.

category.description: The investment category for which a top pick is highlighted.

fund_name.description: The name of the fund selected as a top option in the category.

metric_type.description: The basis for the selection (e.g., 'Best Return vs. Cost', 'Lowest TER', 'Active Outperformance').

rationale.description: A brief explanation for why this fund was chosen as a top pick.

top_funds_by_category_summary.description: A summary highlighting the top-performing and most cost-effective fund options within each investment category, based on the comparative analysis of returns, expense ratios, and investment strategy.

amc_name.description: The name of the Asset Management Company.

summary_of_offerings.description: A high-level summary of the AMC's international fund offerings and their general status.

key_funds_status.description: A list detailing the status of key international funds from this AMC.

amc_specific_overviews.description: A detailed breakdown of international fund offerings by major Asset Management Companies (AMCs) like Motilal Oswal, Franklin Templeton, DSP, ICICI Prudential, HDFC, SBI, Kotak, Axis, Nippon India, Mirae Asset, PGIM, and Edelweiss. Each entry will summarize the status of their key international funds.

rank.description: The rank of the fund by Assets Under Management (AUM).

aum_in_crore.description: The Assets Under Management (AUM) of the fund, in crores of INR.

largest_open_funds_by_aum.description: A list of the top 10 largest international funds by Assets Under Management (AUM) that are currently open for subscription, including their AUM figures.

amc_name.description: The name of the AMC that reopened its funds.

fund_name.description: The name of the fund that has resumed subscriptions.

reopening_date.description: The date when the fund reopened for subscriptions.

monthly_cap_per_pan_inr.description: The new monthly investment cap per PAN for the reopened fund, in INR.

notes.description: Additional details about the reopening conditions, such as daily or weekly limits.

strategy_type.description: The type of investment strategy (e.g., 'Passive ETF FoF', 'Active FoF', 'Country-specific').

risk_reward_profile.description: An analysis of the risk and potential reward associated with this strategy.

portfolio_concentration_details.description: Insights into the portfolio concentration (e.g., sector, stock, or index concentration).

representative_funds.description: Examples of funds that follow this investment strategy.

platform_name.description: The name of the investment platform (e.g., 'Zerodha Coin', 'Groww', 'Value Research').

availability_summary.description: A summary of the availability of international funds on this platform.

url.description: A direct URL to the relevant category or fund list page on the platform, if available.
